sentences.target: J'ai perdu mon passeport à l'aéroport.

translations.fr: J'ai perdu mon passeport à l'aéroport.
translations.en: I lost my passport at the airport.
translations.es: Perdí mi pasaporte en el aeropuerto.
translations.de: Ich habe meinen Reisepass am Flughafen verloren.
translations.it: Ho perso il mio passaporto in aeroporto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在机场把护照弄丢了。
translations.yue: 我喺機場唔見咗我本護照。
translations.ru: Я потерял свой паспорт в аэропорту.
translations.he: איבדתי את הדרכון שלי בשדה התעופה.
translations.vi: Tôi làm mất hộ chiếu ở sân bay.
translations.nl: Ik ben mijn paspoort op de luchthaven kwijtgeraakt.
translations.hi: मैंने हवाई अड्डे पर अपना पासपोर्ट खो दिया.
translations.el: Έχασα το διαβατήριό μου στο αεροδρόμιο.
translations.nb: Jeg mistet passet mitt på flyplassen.
translations.id: Saya kehilangan paspor saya di bandara.
translations.sv: Jag tappade bort mitt pass på flygplatsen.
translations.cs: Ztratil jsem svůj pas na letišti.
translations.da: Jeg mistede mit pas i lufthavnen.
translations.ja: 空港でパスポートをなくしました。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun (1st person singular) elided before a vowel; sets the person of the auxiliary.
Auxiliary verb (present indicative, 1sg) forming the passé composé with the past participle.
Past participle of the lexical verb; with 'avoir' in compound past; direct object follows, so no agreement.
Possessive determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'passeport'; indicates possession by the speaker.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'perdu'.
Simple preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article elided before a vowel; attached to the following noun; marks definiteness.
Noun (masculine); object of the preposition 'à' in a locative phrase.

translations.vi: Bạn đã lấy hộ chiếu của mình.
translations.nb: Du tok med deg passet ditt.
translations.sv: Du tog med dig ditt pass.
translations.ja: パスポートを持っていった。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (2nd person singular).
Auxiliary verb (present indicative, 2sg) used to form the passé composé.
Past participle of the lexical verb; with 'avoir' in compound past; object follows, so no agreement.
Possessive determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'passeport'; indicates possession by the addressee.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'pris'.

sentences.target: On doit renouveler le passeport demain.

translations.fr: On doit renouveler le passeport demain.
translations.en: We have to renew the passport tomorrow.
translations.es: Tenemos que renovar el pasaporte mañana.
translations.de: Wir müssen den Reisepass morgen erneuern.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לחדש את הדרכון מחר.
translations.vi: Chúng ta phải gia hạn hộ chiếu vào ngày mai.
translations.nl: We moeten morgen het paspoort vernieuwen.
translations.hu: Holnap meg kell újítanunk az útlevelet.
translations.hi: हमें कल पासपोर्ट का नवीनीकरण करना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να ανανεώσουμε το διαβατήριο αύριο.
translations.nb: Vi må fornye passet i morgen.
translations.sv: Vi måste förnya passet i morgon.
translations.da: Vi skal forny passet i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日パスポートを更新しなければならない。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun; grammatically 3rd person singular.
Finite verb (present indicative, 3sg); modal expressing obligation; governs the infinitive 'renouveler'.
Infinitive verb complement (non-finite) of 'doit'; denotes the action to be carried out.
Definite article (masculine singular) introducing 'passeport'; marks definiteness/specificity.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'renouveler'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates when the action should occur.

sentences.target: Ils contrôlent mon passeport au guichet.

translations.fr: Ils contrôlent mon passeport au guichet.
translations.en: They check my passport at the counter.
translations.es: Revisan mi pasaporte en el mostrador.
translations.de: Sie überprüfen meinen Reisepass am Schalter.
translations.it: Controllano il mio passaporto allo sportello.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在柜台检查我的护照。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺櫃檯檢查我本護照。
translations.ru: Они проверяют мой паспорт у стойки.
translations.pt: Eles verificam meu passaporte no balcão.
translations.he: הם בודקים את הדרכון שלי בדלפק.
translations.vi: Họ kiểm tra hộ chiếu của tôi tại quầy.
translations.ar: هم يفحصون جواز سفري عند الشباك.
translations.nl: Ze controleren mijn paspoort bij de balie.
translations.uk: Вони перевіряють мій паспорт на стійці.
translations.hi: वे काउंटर पर मेरा पासपोर्ट जांचते हैं.
translations.el: Ελέγχουν το διαβατήριό μου στο γκισέ.
translations.nb: De kontrollerer passet mitt ved skranken.
translations.id: Mereka memeriksa paspor saya di loket.
translations.sv: De kontrollerar mitt pass vid disken.
translations.da: De tjekker mit pas ved skranken.
translations.ja: 窓口で私のパスポートを確認します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (3rd person plural, masculine or mixed).
Finite verb (present indicative, 3pl); transitive; takes 'mon passeport' as direct object.
Possessive determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'passeport'; indicates possession by the speaker.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'contrôlent'.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; preposition plus article introducing the locative noun 'guichet'.
Noun; object of the preposition 'au'; denotes the place of the control.

jp: J'ai perdu mon passeport à l'aéroport.
On doit renouveler le passeport demain.
Ils contrôlent mon passeport au guichet.
fr: J'ai perdu mon passeport à l'aéroport.
On doit renouveler le passeport demain.
Ils contrôlent mon passeport au guichet.
en: I lost my passport at the airport.
We have to renew the passport tomorrow.
They check my passport at the counter.
